mapper.sql: report_id, execution_id, test_id, generated_at, summary, details, comparisons, format, file_path, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_report
execution_id = #{executionId}, test_id = #{testId}, generated_at = #{generatedAt}, summary = #{summary}, details = #{details}, comparisons = #{comparisons}, format = #{format}, file_path = #{filePath}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_report SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_report WHERE report_id = #{reportId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_report WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_report r JOIN t_execution e ON r.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE r.test_id = #{testId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.generated_at DESC
SELECT FROM t_report WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_report WHERE deleted = 0
